if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND h.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND h.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND h.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND h.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdSkuChgHist :: selectById */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , cd_sct.code_label AS chg_type_cd_nm FROM pdh_prod_sku_chg_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = h.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sct ON cd_sct.code_grp = 'SKU_CHG_TYPE' AND cd_sct.code_value = h.chg_type_cd WHERE h.hist_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdSkuChgHist :: selectList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , cd_sct.code_label AS chg_type_cd_nm FROM pdh_prod_sku_chg_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = h.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sct ON cd_sct.code_grp = 'SKU_CHG_TYPE' AND cd_sct.code_value = h.chg_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdSkuChgHist :: selectPageList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , cd_sct.code_label AS chg_type_cd_nm FROM pdh_prod_sku_chg_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = h.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sct ON cd_sct.code_grp = 'SKU_CHG_TYPE' AND cd_sct.code_value = h.chg_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(h.*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdSkuChgHist :: selectPageCount */ FROM pdh_prod_sku_chg_hist h
